description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: tests, docs, and style, each running on ubuntu-latest. The tests job should use a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.7 through 3.13, while the docs and style jobs use Python 3.13. Each job should check out the code, set up Python, cache pip and pre-commit dependencies, install tox, and run specific tox environments.
